content: Subject exhibits elevated pacing behavior in the common triage tracking bay. Refusing direct seating but remains cooperative with basic vitals collection parameters. Speech pattern is measured, logical, and steady.
Subject stands by the common table singing songs and dancing, and sings louder in the presence of others.
Initial intake interview conducted. Patient reports notable sleep cycle disruptions over the last 72 hours, estimating less than 3 hours of restful sleep per night. Denies active somatic distress.
